immutability: This version becomes immutable the first time an assessment cycle uses it. Changes after that point require a new version.

descriptors.1: Consistent AI assistance used by individuals
descriptors.2: As a team member executing work under human direction
descriptors.3: A delivery system of agents operating in the background

descriptors.0: Various tasks within the SDLC such as writing requirements, writing code, debugging, etc.
descriptors.1: AI suggests lines of code, explains unfamiliar modules, helps debug, or drafts tests
descriptors.2: AI is prompted through idea clarification and design, creates specs, architects, generates code, and tests
descriptors.3: A bug is assigned to AI; it triages, replicates, builds, tests, and returns a proposed solution

descriptors.2: SDLC becomes a faster guided pipeline with AI
descriptors.3: SDLC steps collapse into an asynchronous agent loop

descriptors.0: % of committed work delivered on time
descriptors.2: % of lines of code built by AI
descriptors.3: % of tickets deflected away from developers

scoring.overallScore: Mean of the seven dimension scores — a continuous 0–3 value used for trend lines and rollup averages.
scoring.levelLabel: Weakest-dimension floor: an individual's level is the minimum score across the seven dimensions. Level 2 requires every dimension ≥ 2.
scoring.rollups: Each hierarchy level reports the mean score per dimension plus the distribution of floor-based levels (e.g. '12% of BU at Level 1+').
